name: cogni-wiki
description: Karpathy-style compounding personal wiki for Claude Code. Claude maintains a persistent, interlinked markdown knowledge base — ingesting sources into summary pages, answering queries from the wiki (not memory), auditing for contradictions and orphans, and updating pages with diff-gated revisions. Inspired by Andrej Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern and the reference implementation by kfchou/wiki-skills.
